_doc: Permission + hook excerpt for ~/.claude/settings.json. Merge these keys into your live settings.json; don't replace the whole file (it also carries machine-specific MCP servers, status line, theme, plugins, etc.). This excerpt is the security-relevant core: what runs silently, what asks, what's blocked.
_hook_snippet: OPTIONAL human-in-the-loop relay. If you wire up an approval relay (see ../docs/human-in-the-loop.md), add it to hooks.PreToolUse — merge with existing entries, don't replace the array. Point the command at your own relay; the placeholder below is not a real path.
